source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Each corner of a rectangular prism is cut off. Two (of the eight) cuts are shown. How many edges does the new figure have?
<image1>

image_dependency: question_text refers to cuts being shown visually: "Two (of the eight) cuts are shown"
asset_registry_record.image_manifest shows a present image and registry_passed=true
the underlying object is geometric/spatial, which usually increases reliance on the figure
multi_step: solving requires reasoning about how truncating all 8 corners of a rectangular prism changes the edge count
this is not direct lookup; it involves combining the original polyhedron structure with the effect of each cut
verifiability: answer_type is numeric and answer_text is a concrete value: "36"
the target quantity is a well-defined combinatorial property: number of edges of the new figure
a later checker can verify the result by geometric/combinatorial counting

decision_reasons: 资产完整：题干、答案和主图像均存在，且 registry_passed=true、issues 为空。
题目目标明确且答案为具体数字，后续可验证性强。
虽有“可能存在非纯视觉解法”的风险标记，但不足以削弱其核心语义完整性或候选价值。
